description: Learnifier is a learning management and digital learning platform for creating and delivering courses, onboarding, and training programs. It provides organizations with learning administration, user management, and integrations with HR and other business systems.
summary: Learnifier exposes one tenant-scoped REST API for LMS/admin automation, authenticated with Learnifier-issued API keys (documented in the current OAS3 docs and reflected by a curated older OpenAPI spec).
